description: Official LaTeX template for RANLP 2025 (Recent Advances in Natural Language Processing) conference proceedings. Provides the required two-column format, double-blind review support with anonymization and line-numbered ruler, title/author/affiliation formatting, natbib-based citation commands, and DOI-linked bibliography support via hyperref, based on the ACL/NAACL/EMNLP line of style files.
